The code is straightforward, auto-generated, and human-readable.\n\n- **Risk Score:**  \n  The risk scores are low (0.1–0.2), reflecting minimal security concern. Given the nature of the code, these are reasonable.\n\n- **Potential Discrepancies:**  \n  No discrepancies or unreasonable scores are evident. The assessments are consistent with the code's content.\n\n---\n\n### Final Assessment:\n\n**Overall Malware Score:**  \n- The code is a standard, static factory for a well-known contract interface.
